reviews.reason: 💨 is a conventional landmark for diffusion, which is explicit on the front. It reveals neither direction nor medium and is neutral across all choices.
💨 is a conventional landmark for diffusion, which is already explicit in the front. It reveals none of the three rate factors and does not favor or eliminate any choice.
🦠 represents the single-celled organism already explicit on the front. It adds no surface-area-to-volume information and remains neutral across every ratio choice.
🫁 represents the mammalian lungs already explicit on the front. It does not reveal the effect of membrane thinness or distinguish the diffusion-path answer from the other exchange-surface features.
